scores.correctness_notes: Response is factually correct and exceeds the gold standard. All required elements are present: service with override/command/startup/environment/on-check-failure, checks with http/level/period/timeout/threshold, and log-targets with type/location/services/labels. Additional fields (user, group, backoff-*, kill-delay, working-dir) are all legitimate Pebble service fields. Two checks (alive/ready) instead of one is valid and adds value.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields used (backoff-factor, backoff-limit, kill-delay, working-dir, user, group, services:[all]) are valid Pebble layer specification fields; syslog type and loki type are both documented; $APP_ENV label interpolation is a documented Pebble feature
